monitor_update_reason: Corrected pick_candidate activity measurement: created_at is not a valid new-insert signal under onConflict upsert. Correct signals are updated_at (activity) and universe_id join (new inserts).
cutover_reference: D-CONST-6 resolution — SGO first successful ingest

measurement_correction.erroneous_signal_reason: DatabasePickCandidateRepository.upsertCandidates() uses onConflict: 'universe_id'. On conflict Postgres updates in-place; created_at is frozen at original INSERT and never updated. All pre-existing rows have created_at 2026-04-21 to 2026-05-20. Zero from this query is a measurement artifact.
measurement_correction.correct_new_insert_signal: JOIN market_universe ON universe_id WHERE market_universe.created_at >= cutover
measurement_correction.scan_run_id_signal: scan_run_id IS NOT NULL AND updated_at >= cutover

pick_candidate_upsert_behavior.on_conflict_action: UPDATE status, filter_details, scan_run_id, provenance, expires_at, updated_at
pick_candidate_upsert_behavior.new_insert_condition: universe_id not previously seen in pick_candidates
pick_candidate_upsert_behavior.scan_run_id_semantics: UUID of the scan run that last wrote this row — advances on every scan

provider_offers_legacy.note: Not the active ingest target; ingestor writes to provider_offer_current

pick_candidates.new_inserts_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pick_candidates pc JOIN market_universe mu ON pc.universe_id = mu.id WHERE mu.created_at >= '2026-06-07T13:38:28Z'

erroneous_original_metric.why_wrong: created_at not updated by upsert — not a valid new-insert signal

pick_candidates.note: 35,145 rows with updated_at >= cutover confirm scan pipeline active post-cutover. These rows predate Wave-5 but their updated_at/scan_run_id reflect post-cutover scan activity.

organic_only.note: Organic estimates are proportional; exact source-level approval breakdown not queried

flags.description: All 1,196 picks created since cutover have sport_id = NULL (100%). Systemic gap — sport_id not populated on pick creation. CLV attribution and corpus filtering both depend on sport_id.
flags.action_required: PM must justify NULL as acceptable for gate corpus OR assign fix lane

flags.description: 112 picks have source='t1-proof', likely proof harness generated rather than organic pipeline activity.

Original FLAG-3 (HIGH: zero new pick_candidates) was based on erroneous created_at >= cutover signal. Corrected: 35,145 rows show updated_at >= cutover confirming scan activity. Whether 355 post-cutover market_universe rows produced new pick_candidate inserts is UNVERIFIED (requires universe_id join query). Downgraded from HIGH to UNVERIFIED pending that query.
flags.action_required: Run: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pick_candidates pc JOIN market_universe mu ON pc.universe_id = mu.id WHERE mu.created_at >= '2026-06-07T13:38:28Z'
